data.title: Vitasora Health Completes A$11m Raise to Drive U.S. Connected Care Expansion
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Vitasora Health ( (AU:VHL) ).

Vitasora Health has completed an A$11 million capital raise, including full receipt of a previously announced A$6.75 million cornerstone investment and earlier strategic placements, materially strengthening its balance sheet and funding position. The fresh capital will support the company’s U.S. growth strategy, including investment in automation and AI-enabled enrolment tools, scaling of Connected Care programs for existing and new clients, and the ramp-up of high-volume Medicaid and fee-for-service initiatives with partners such as Iris Health, Tampa Family Health Centers and Family Care in West Virginia. Operationally, Vitasora reported growing active patient programs, rapid enrolments under new partnerships and an expanding U.S. sales pipeline, and its board believes the reinforced capital base leaves the company well positioned to pursue its expansion and achieve cash-flow breakeven by the end of FY2026, potentially enhancing its competitive standing in the U.S. remote care market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:VHL) stock is a Sell with a A$0.03 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Vitasora Health stock, see the AU:VHL Stock Forecast page.

More about Vitasora Health

Vitasora Health Limited is an Australia-listed digital healthcare company focused on the U.S. market, providing connected care solutions such as remote patient monitoring (RPM) and chronic care management (CCM). It combines technology and clinical teams to deliver turnkey remote healthcare services aimed at improving outcomes, reducing costs and supporting providers operating in value-based care models across Medicare, Medicaid and fee-for-service programs.

Average Trading Volume: 2,308,761

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$39.02M

Minmetals Land Limited has convened a court-ordered meeting in Bermuda for its scheme shareholders on 9 February 2026 in Hong Kong to consider and vote on a proposed scheme of arrangement between the company and its scheme shareholders. data.title: Boston Scientific to Acquire Penumbra in Cash-Stock Merger
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Boston Scientific ( (BSX) ) has issued an update.

On January 14, 2026, Boston Scientific entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Penumbra, Inc. via a merger in which Penumbra will become a wholly owned subsidiary, with Penumbra shareholders able to elect either cash of $374 per share or 3.8721 Boston Scientific shares per Penumbra share, subject to proration that targets roughly 73% cash and 27% stock. The deal includes detailed treatment of Penumbra stock options and restricted stock units, customary closing conditions such as antitrust and other regulatory approvals, Penumbra shareholder approval, stock exchange listing of new Boston Scientific shares, and mutual covenants restricting Penumbra from soliciting competing bids except under a fiduciary out, alongside substantial reverse and standard termination fees that underscore both parties’ commitment and highlight regulatory and competitive risks for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (BSX) stock is a Buy with a $121.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Boston Scientific stock, see the BSX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BSX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BSX is a Outperform.

Boston Scientific’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance and positive earnings call outcomes. While the technical analysis and valuation present some concerns, the company’s robust growth trajectory and raised guidance support a favorable outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on BSX stock, click here.

More about Boston Scientific

Boston Scientific Corporation is a global medical technology company that develops and manufactures devices for a range of interventional medical specialties, including cardiovascular, neurological and other minimally invasive procedures. The company focuses on expanding its portfolio through strategic acquisitions to strengthen its position in high-growth therapeutic areas and broaden its presence in hospital and procedural settings worldwide.

data.title: Norris Industries Delays Quarterly SEC Filing
data.description:
Norris Industries ( (NRIS) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Norris Industries, Inc. has filed a Form 12b-25, notifying regulators and investors that it will be late in submitting its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the quarter ended November 30, 2025. The delayed filing concerns its regular quarterly financial report, not an annual Form 10-K (Yearly Report) or Form 20-F (Yearly Report).

The company attributes the delay mainly to additional work needed to complete its financial closing process. In particular, management is still evaluating how to properly classify its Series A convertible preferred stock on the balance sheet. This technical accounting assessment has slowed down the completion of the overall quarterly reporting package and would require unreasonable effort or expense to finish by the original deadline.

Norris Industries states that it expects to file the outstanding Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) within the standard extension window allowed under SEC rules—specifically, within five calendar days after the original due date of the report.

From a financial impact standpoint, the company does not anticipate any significant change in its operating results compared with the same quarter in the prior year. In other words, despite the delay, management is not warning of major surprises in earnings. That said, all such statements about expected timing and the nature of results are forward-looking and depend on the completion of the remaining accounting and review work.

The company indicates that all other required SEC reports over the past 12 months have been filed on time, suggesting that this is a one-off timing issue rather than a pattern of noncompliance. The notification is signed on behalf of Norris Industries, Inc. by CEO Patrick Norris, underscoring management’s responsibility for both the disclosure and the ongoing effort to finalize the quarterly financial statements and remain in compliance with reporting obligations.

More about Norris Industries

Average Trading Volume: 3,207

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $15.91M

Learn more about NRIS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Love Pharma Inc ( (TSE:JOLT) ) has issued an update.

Jolt Health Inc. has appointed Chris Farnworth as an independent director to its board, bringing in a seasoned business development and corporate finance executive with deep experience in the global mining, green energy and circular-economy sectors, including prior roles at a Top 50 TSX Venture company and Noram Lithium, as well as his current position as CEO of UK-based Zero Carbon Technologies. Farnworth’s appointment, alongside the resignation of director Douglas Taylor, is expected to strengthen Jolt’s strategic capabilities and global network as the company advances its life sciences and AI-driven healthcare ambitions, potentially enhancing its access to capital, sustainability-focused partnerships and new international growth opportunities.

More about Love Pharma Inc

Jolt Health Inc. is a life sciences company focused on healthcare, biotechnology and artificial intelligence, holding exclusive licenses for innovative therapeutic and pharmaceutical products across Europe, the UK and North America. The company aims to help shape the future of healthcare through research, collaboration and technological advancement, positioning itself at the intersection of cutting-edge medical innovation and AI-driven solutions.

The latest announcement is out from Crawford & Company A ( ($CRD.A) ).

On January 14, 2026, Crawford & Company entered into a new executive employment agreement with Michael J. Hoberman in connection with his promotion to CEO – US Operations, effective January 1, 2026. The agreement outlines a compensation package including a $475,000 annual base salary beginning in 2026, a target annual bonus equal to 57.5% of base salary under the Short Term Incentive Plan, long-term incentive awards targeted at $550,000 for 2026, and a sales incentive payment equal to 0.5% of quarterly billed U.S. service fees for the first 24 months of each sale, signaling a strong performance- and growth-oriented focus for the company’s U.S. leadership structure.

Prudential Financial ( (PRU) ) has provided an announcement.

For the quarter ended December 31, 2025, Prudential Financial reported preliminary figures showing PGIM segment assets under management of $1.47 trillion and approximately $55 million in other related revenues, net of related expenses, on an adjusted operating income basis, reflecting income from incentive and transaction fees, seed and co-investments, and mortgage originations. Over the same period, alternative investment income in the company’s General Account portfolio was estimated to be $5 million to $25 million below near-term expectations, and management emphasized that these unaudited figures are based on preliminary data and may differ materially once financial closing procedures are completed and full quarterly results are released in early February 2026.

data.title: Horizon Space Updates Proxy Materials for SL BIO Merger
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp. ( (HSPT) ) has provided an update.

On January 13, 2026, Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp. filed a definitive proxy statement for an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders scheduled for February 3, 2026, to vote on its proposed business combination with SL BIO Ltd., and has now issued updated proxy materials correcting and replacing certain references to its trust and transfer agents. The company clarified that Wilmington Trust, National Association, is the trustee of its IPO trust account and updated contact details for its proxy solicitor and transfer agent, while also restating detailed redemption procedures and deadlines for public shareholders, including a January 30, 2026 redemption election cutoff, and warning that significant redemptions could reduce post-merger liquidity and potentially jeopardize the combined company’s ability to meet Nasdaq listing standards, although no changes were made to the meeting’s time, place, record date, or proposals.

More about Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp.

Horizon Space Acquisition II Corp. (HSPT) is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed to effect a business combination, or merger, with one or more operating businesses, and is currently pursuing a proposed transaction with SL BIO Ltd., a Cayman Islands exempted company, as part of its strategy to bring a target company to the public markets.
